};\n\nfunction sigmoid(x: number, midpoint: number, steepness: number): number {\n\treturn 1 / (1 + Math.exp(-steepness * (x - midpoint)));\n}\n\nfunction pickNewStatus(\n\tcurrent: ControlStatus,\n\tprogress: number,\n\ttrend: MockHistoryConfig[\"trend\"],\n\tvariance: number,\n\ttargetEffectiveness?: number\n): ControlStatus {\n\tconst rand = Math.random() * 100;\n\tconst varianceFactor = variance / 100;\n\n\tlet effectiveProb: number;\n\n\tswitch (trend) {\n\t\tcase \"improving\":\n\t\t\teffectiveProb = sigmoid(progress, 0.5, 8) * 100;\n\t\t\tbreak;\n\t\tcase \"degrading\":\n\t\t\teffectiveProb = (1 - sigmoid(progress, 0.5, 8)) * 100;\n\t\t\tbreak;\n\t\tcase \"stable\":\n\t\t\teffectiveProb = targetEffectiveness ?? 60;\n\t\t\tbreak;\n\t\tcase \"volatile\":\n\t\t\teffectiveProb = 50 + Math.sin(progress * Math.PI * 6) * 40;\n\t\t\tbreak;\n\t}\n\n\tif (targetEffectiveness !== undefined) {\n\t\teffectiveProb = effectiveProb * (1 - progress) + targetEffectiveness * progress;\n\t}\n\n\teffectiveProb += (Math.random() - 0.5) * varianceFactor * 60;\n\teffectiveProb = Math.max(5, Math.min(95, effectiveProb));\n\n\tconst nullChance = 5 + varianceFactor * 10;\n\n\tif (current === null) {\n\t\tif (rand < effectiveProb * 0.8) {\n\t\t\treturn \"effective\";\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (rand < effectiveProb * 0.8 + (100 - effectiveProb) * 0.6) {\n\t\t\treturn \"ineffective\";\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn null;\n\t}\n\n\tif (current === \"effective\") {\n\t\tif (rand < nullChance) {\n\t\t\treturn null;\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (rand < nullChance + (100 - effectiveProb) * varianceFactor) {\n\t\t\treturn \"ineffective\";\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn \"effective\";\n\t}\n\n\tif (rand < nullChance) {\n\t\treturn null;\n\t}\n\tif (rand < nullChance + effectiveProb * varianceFactor * 1.5) {\n\t\treturn \"effective\";\n\t}\n\treturn \"ineffective\";\n}\n\nfunction validateBody(body: MockHistoryConfig) {\n\tif (\n\t\t!body.applicationIds ||\n\t\t!Array.isArray(body.applicationIds) ||\n\t\tbody.applicationIds.length === 0\n\t) {\n\t\tthrow createError({ statusCode: 400, message: \"At least one applicationId is required\" });\n\t}\n\tif (!body.durationDays || body.durationDays < 1 || body.durationDays > 730) {\n\t\tthrow createError({ statusCode: 400, message: \"durationDays must be between 1 and 730\" });\n\t}\n\tif (!body.eventsPerControl || body.eventsPerControl < 1 || body.eventsPerControl > 50) {\n\t\tthrow createError({ statusCode: 400, message: \"eventsPerControl must be between 1 and 50\" });\n\t}\n\tif (![\"improving\", \"degrading\", \"stable\", \"volatile\"].includes(body.trend)) {\n\t\tthrow createError({\n\t\t\tstatusCode: 400,\n\t\t\tmessage: \"trend must be improving, degrading, stable, or volatile\"\n\t\t});\n\t}\n\tif (body.variance === undefined || body.variance < 0 || body.variance > 100) {\n\t\tthrow createError({ statusCode: 400, message: \"variance must be between 0 and 100\" });\n\t}\n\tif (body.targetEffectiveness !== undefined) {\n\t\tif (\n\t\t\ttypeof body.targetEffectiveness !== \"number\" ||\n\t\t\t!Number.isFinite(body.targetEffectiveness) ||\n\t\t\tbody.targetEffectiveness < 0 ||\n\t\t\tbody.targetEffectiveness > 100\n\t\t) {\n\t\t\tthrow createError({\n\t\t\t\tstatusCode: 400,\n\t\t\t\tmessage: \"targetEffectiveness must be a number between 0 and 100\"\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n/** Generate event rows for a single stance, returning events + final status per (app:stmt) */\nfunction generateEventsForStance(\n\tstanceId: string,\n\tselectedAppsInStance: Array<string>,\n\tappStatementMap: Map<string, Array<string>>,\n\tbody: MockHistoryConfig,\n\twindow: TimeWindow,\n\tuserEmail: string\n): { events: Array<EventRow>; finalStatuses: Map<string, ControlStatus> } {\n\tconst stmtIds = [\n\t\t...new Set(selectedAppsInStance.flatMap(appId => appStatementMap.get(appId) ?? []))\n\t];\n\tif (stmtIds.length === 0) {\n\t\treturn { events: [], finalStatuses: new Map() };\n\t}\n\n\tconst totalEvents = Math.max(body.eventsPerControl * stmtIds.length, 5);\n\tconst timeStep = (window.now - window.startTime) / (totalEvents + 1);\n\n\tconst statusTracker = new Map<string, ControlStatus>();\n\tfor (const appId of selectedAppsInStance) {\n\t\tfor (const stmtId of appStatementMap.get(appId) ?? []) {\n\t\t\tstatusTracker.set(`${appId}:${stmtId}`, null);\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tconst events: Array<EventRow> = [];\n\n\tfor (let i = 0; i < totalEvents; i++) {\n\t\tconst progress = i / totalEvents;\n\t\tconst eventTime = new Date(window.startTime + (i + 1) * timeStep);\n\t\tconst jitter = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 4 * 60 * 60 * 1000;\n\t\teventTime.setTime(eventTime.getTime() + jitter);\n\n\t\tconst appId = selectedAppsInStance[Math.floor(Math.random() * selectedAppsInStance.length)];\n\t\tconst stmtCandidates = appStatementMap.get(appId) ?? [];\n\t\tif (stmtCandidates.length === 0) {\n\t\t\tcontinue;\n\t\t}\n\t\tconst stmtId = stmtCandidates[Math.floor(Math.random() * stmtCandidates.length)];\n\n\t\tconst key = `${appId}:${stmtId}`;\n\t\tconst currentStatus = statusTracker.get(key) ?? null;\n\t\tconst newStatus = pickNewStatus(\n\t\t\tcurrentStatus,\n\t\t\tprogress,\n\t\t\tbody.trend,\n\t\t\tbody.variance,\n\t\t\tbody.targetEffectiveness\n\t\t);\n\n\t\tif (newStatus === currentStatus) {\n\t\t\tcontinue;\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tstatusTracker.set(key, newStatus);\n\t\tevents.push({\n\t\t\tapplicationId: appId,\n\t\t\tstatementId: stmtId,\n\t\t\tstanceId,\n\t\t\tpreviousStatus: currentStatus,\n\t\t\tnewStatus,\n\t\t\tchangedBy: userEmail,\n\t\t\tchangedAt: eventTime.toISOString()\n\t\t});\n\t}\n\n\treturn { events, finalStatuses: statusTracker };\n}\n\n/** Compute snapshot rows by replaying events against a full status tracker.\n * Produces both stance-level (applicationId = null) and per-app snapshots.\n * When rmfContext is provided, computes tag + category effectiveness for stance-level snapshots. */\nfunction computeSnapshotsFromEvents(\n\tstanceId: string,\n\teventBatch: Array<EventRow>,\n\tfullStatusTracker: Map<string, ControlStatus>,\n\tuserEmail: string,\n\trmfContext?: RmfContext | null\n): Array<SnapshotRow> {\n\tif (eventBatch.length === 0) {\n\t\treturn [];\n\t}\n\n\tconst snapshotCount = Math.min(\n\t\tMath.max(20, Math.floor(eventBatch.length / 3)),\n\t\teventBatch.length\n\t);\n\tconst snapshotInterval = Math.max(1, Math.floor(eventBatch.length / snapshotCount));\n\tconst snapshots: Array<SnapshotRow> = [];\n\n\t// Pre-compute RMF mappings once if context available\n\tlet stmtToTags: Map<string, Set<string>> | null = null;\n\tlet tagMeta: Map<string, { color: string; icon: string }> | null = null;\n\tlet stmtToCategories: Map<string, Set<string>> | null = null;\n\n\tif (rmfContext) {\n\t\tstmtToTags = new Map();\n\t\ttagMeta = new Map();\n\t\tstmtToCategories = new Map();\n\n\t\t// Collect all statement IDs from the tracker\n\t\tconst allStmtIds = new Set<string>();\n\t\tfor (const key of fullStatusTracker.keys()) {\n\t\t\tconst stmtId = key.split(\":\")[1];\n\t\t\tif (stmtId) {\n\t\t\t\tallStmtIds.add(stmtId);\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tfor (const statementId of allStmtIds) {\n\t\t\tconst directFieldIds = rmfContext.statementToFieldIds.get(statementId);\n\t\t\tif (!directFieldIds || directFieldIds.size === 0) {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue;\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tconst allFieldIds = new Set<string>();\n\t\t\tfor (const fid of directFieldIds) {\n\t\t\t\tallFieldIds.add(fid);\n\t\t\t\tconst ancestors = rmfContext.ancestorMap.get(fid);\n\t\t\t\tif (ancestors) {\n\t\t\t\t\tfor (const aid of ancestors) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tallFieldIds.add(aid);\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tconst tags = new Set<string>();\n\t\t\tfor (const fid of allFieldIds) {\n\t\t\t\tconst field = rmfContext.rmfFieldById.get(fid);\n\t\t\t\tif (field?.tags) {\n\t\t\t\t\tfor (const t of field.tags) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\ttags.add(t.name);\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif (!tagMeta!.has(t.name)) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttagMeta!.set(t.name, { color: t.color ?? \"#888888\", icon: t.icon ?? \"tag\" });\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif (tags.size > 0) {\n\t\t\t\tstmtToTags!.set(statementId, tags);\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tconst categories = new Set<string>();\n\t\t\tfor (const fid of allFieldIds) {\n\t\t\t\tconst field = rmfContext.rmfFieldById.get(fid);\n\t\t\t\tif (field && field.indent === 0) {\n\t\t\t\t\tcategories.add(field.id);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif (categories.size > 0) {\n\t\t\t\tstmtToCategories!.set(statementId, categories);\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tfor (let i = 0; i < eventBatch.length; i++) {\n\t\tconst evt = eventBatch[i];\n\t\tconst fullKey = `${evt.applicationId}:${evt.statementId}`;\n\t\tfullStatusTracker.set(fullKey, evt.newStatus);\n\n\t\tif (i % snapshotInterval !== 0 && i !== eventBatch.length - 1) {\n\t\t\tcontinue;\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Build stance-level control map\n\t\tconst controlMap = new Map<\n\t\t\tstring,\n\t\t\t{ totalApps: number; effectiveApps: number; notTestedApps: number }\n\t\t>();\n\n\t\t// Build per-app counts\n\t\tconst perAppCounts = new Map<\n\t\t\tstring,\n\t\t\t{ total: number; effective: number; ineffective: number; notTested: number }\n\t\t>();\n\n\t\t// Also build per-app per-statement status lookup for tag/category computation\n\t\tconst appStmtStatusMap = new Map<string, ControlStatus>();\n\n\t\tfor (const [key, status] of fullStatusTracker) {\n\t\t\tconst [appId, stmtId] = key.split(\":\");\n\t\t\tappStmtStatusMap.set(key, status);\n\n\t\t\t// Stance-level\n\t\t\tif (!controlMap.has(stmtId)) {\n\t\t\t\tcontrolMap.set(stmtId, { totalApps: 0, effectiveApps: 0, notTestedApps: 0 });\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tconst c = controlMap.get(stmtId)!;\n\t\t\tc.totalApps += 1;\n\t\t\tif (status === \"effective\") {\n\t\t\t\tc.effectiveApps += 1;\n\t\t\t} else if (status === null) {\n\t\t\t\tc.notTestedApps += 1;\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Per-app\n\t\t\tif (!perAppCounts.has(appId)) {\n\t\t\t\tperAppCounts.set(appId, { total: 0, effective: 0, ineffective: 0, notTested: 0 });\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tconst ac = perAppCounts.get(appId)!;\n\t\t\tac.total += 1;\n\t\t\tif (status === \"effective\") {\n\t\t\t\tac.effective += 1;\n\t\t\t} else if (status === \"ineffective\") {\n\t\t\t\tac.ineffective += 1;\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tac.notTested += 1;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Stance-level counts\n\t\tlet effective = 0;\n\t\tlet ineffective = 0;\n\t\tlet notTested = 0;\n\n\t\tfor (const [, c] of controlMap) {\n\t\t\tif (c.totalApps > 0 && c.effectiveApps === c.totalApps) {\n\t\t\t\teffective += 1;\n\t\t\t} else if (c.notTestedApps > 0) {\n\t\t\t\tnotTested += 1;\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tineffective += 1;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tconst tc = effective + ineffective + notTested;\n\n\t\t// Stance-level percentage: average of per-app percentages\n\t\tconst appIds = Array.from(perAppCounts.keys());\n\t\tconst appPercentages = appIds.map(appId => {\n\t\t\tconst ac = perAppCounts.get(appId)!;\n\t\t\treturn ac.total > 0 ? (ac.effective / ac.total) * 100 : 0;\n\t\t});\n\t\tconst pct =\n\t\t\tappPercentages.length > 0\n\t\t\t\t? (appPercentages.reduce((s, p) => s + p, 0) / appPercentages.length).toFixed(2)\n\t\t\t\t: \"0.00\";\n\n\t\t// Compute tag + category effectiveness for stance-level snapshot\n\t\tlet tagEffectiveness: Array<SnapshotTagEffectiveness> | null = null;\n\t\tlet categoryEffectiveness: Array<SnapshotCategoryEffectiveness> | null = null;\n\n\t\tif (rmfContext && stmtToTags && tagMeta && stmtToCategories) {\n\t\t\t// Per-tag\n\t\t\tconst allTagNames = new Set<string>();\n\t\t\tfor (const tags of stmtToTags.values()) {\n\t\t\t\tfor (const t of tags) {\n\t\t\t\t\tallTagNames.add(t);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif (allTagNames.size > 0) {\n\t\t\t\tconst tagResults: Array<SnapshotTagEffectiveness> = [];\n\t\t\t\tfor (const tagName of allTagNames) {\n\t\t\t\t\tconst stmtsWithTag = new Set<string>();\n\t\t\t\t\tfor (const [stmtId, tags] of stmtToTags) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif (tags.has(tagName)) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tstmtsWithTag.add(stmtId);\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\tconst tagAppPcts: Array<number> = [];\n\t\t\t\t\tfor (const appId of appIds) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tlet tagTotal = 0;\n\t\t\t\t\t\tlet tagEffective = 0;\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfor (const stmtId of stmtsWithTag) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tconst key = `${appId}:${stmtId}`;\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif (appStmtStatusMap.has(key)) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttagTotal += 1;\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif (appStmtStatusMap.get(key) === \"effective\") {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttagEffective += 1;\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif (tagTotal > 0) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttagAppPcts.push((tagEffective / tagTotal) * 100);\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\tconst avgPct =\n\t\t\t\t\t\ttagAppPcts.length > 0 ? tagAppPcts.reduce((s, p) => s + p, 0) / tagAppPcts.length : 0;\n\t\t\t\t\tconst controlsInTag = stmtsWithTag.size;\n\t\t\t\t\tconst meta = tagMeta.get(tagName)!;\n\t\t\t\t\ttagResults.push({\n\t\t\t\t\t\ttagName,\n\t\t\t\t\t\ttagColor: meta.color,\n\t\t\t\t\t\ttagIcon: meta.icon,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcontrolsInTag,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcontrolsEffectiveInTag: Math.round((avgPct * controlsInTag) / 100)\n\t\t\t\t\t});\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\ttagEffectiveness = tagResults;\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Per-category\n\t\t\tif (rmfContext.rootCategoryFields.length > 0) {\n\t\t\t\tconst catResults: Array<SnapshotCategoryEffectiveness> = [];\n\t\t\t\tfor (const catField of rmfContext.rootCategoryFields) {\n\t\t\t\t\tconst stmtsInCat = new Set<string>();\n\t\t\t\t\tfor (const [stmtId, cats] of stmtToCategories) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif (cats.has(catField.id)) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tstmtsInCat.add(stmtId);\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\tif (stmtsInCat.size === 0) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcontinue;\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\tconst catAppPcts: Array<number> = [];\n\t\t\t\t\tfor (const appId of appIds) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tlet catTotal = 0;\n\t\t\t\t\t\tlet catEffective = 0;\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfor (const stmtId of stmtsInCat) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tconst key = `${appId}:${stmtId}`;\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif (appStmtStatusMap.has(key)) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tcatTotal += 1;\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif (appStmtStatusMap.get(key) === \"effective\") {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tcatEffective += 1;\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif (catTotal > 0) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tcatAppPcts.push((catEffective / catTotal) * 100);\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\tconst avgPct =\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcatAppPcts.length > 0 ? catAppPcts.reduce((s, p) => s + p, 0) / catAppPcts.length : 0;\n\t\t\t\t\tconst controlsInCategory = stmtsInCat.size;\n\t\t\t\t\tcatResults.push({\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcategoryId: catField.id,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcategoryName: catField.title,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcategoryTitle: catField.fullTitle,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcontrolsInCategory,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcontrolsEffectiveInCategory: Math.round((avgPct * controlsInCategory) / 100)\n\t\t\t\t\t});\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tcategoryEffectiveness = catResults.length > 0 ? catResults : null;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Stance-level snapshot (applicationId = null)\n\t\tsnapshots.push({\n\t\t\tstanceId,\n\t\t\tapplicationId: null,\n\t\t\ttriggeredBy: userEmail,\n\t\t\ttriggerApplicationId: evt.applicationId,\n\t\t\ttriggerStatementId: evt.statementId,\n\t\t\ttotalControls: tc,\n\t\t\teffectiveControls: effective,\n\t\t\tineffectiveControls: ineffective,\n\t\t\tnotTestedControls: notTested,\n\t\t\teffectivenessPercentage: pct,\n\t\t\ttagEffectiveness,\n\t\t\tcategoryEffectiveness,\n\t\t\tsnapshotAt: evt.changedAt\n\t\t});\n\n\t\t// Per-app snapshots\n\t\tfor (const [appId, ac] of perAppCounts) {\n\t\t\tconst appPct = ac.total > 0 ? ((ac.effective / ac.total) * 100).toFixed(2) : \"0.00\";\n\t\t\tsnapshots.push({\n\t\t\t\tstanceId,\n\t\t\t\tapplicationId: appId,\n\t\t\t\ttriggeredBy: userEmail,\n\t\t\t\ttriggerApplicationId: evt.applicationId,\n\t\t\t\ttriggerStatementId: evt.statementId,\n\t\t\t\ttotalControls: ac.total,\n\t\t\t\teffectiveControls: ac.effective,\n\t\t\t\tineffectiveControls: ac.ineffective,\n\t\t\t\tnotTestedControls: ac.notTested,\n\t\t\t\teffectivenessPercentage: appPct,\n\t\t\t\ttagEffectiveness: null,\n\t\t\t\tcategoryEffectiveness: null,\n\t\t\t\tsnapshotAt: evt.changedAt\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn snapshots;\n}\n\n/** Insert rows in chunks to avoid query size limits */\nasync function insertInChunks<T extends Record<string, unknown>>(\n\t// oxlint-disable-next-line no-explicit-any\n\ttable: any,\n\trows: Array<T>,\n\tchunkSize = 100\n) {\n\tconst db = getDrizzle();\n\tfor (let i = 0; i < rows.length; i += chunkSize) {\n\t\tconst chunk = rows.slice(i, i + chunkSize);\n\t\tawait db.insert(table).values(chunk);\n\t}\n}\n\n/** Process a single stance: generate events + snapshots, insert into DB.\n * After inserting new events, reads ALL events from the DB for this stance\n * (including existing events from non-selected apps) to compute accurate\n * stance-level snapshots. */\nasync function processStance(\n\tstanceId: string,\n\tselectedAppsInStance: Array<string>,\n\tappStatementMap: Map<string, Array<string>>,\n\tbody: MockHistoryConfig,\n\twindow: TimeWindow,\n\tuserEmail: string\n): Promise<{ events: number; snapshots: number; finalStatuses: Map<string, ControlStatus> }> {\n\tconst db = getDrizzle();\n\n\tconst { events: eventBatch, finalStatuses } = generateEventsForStance(\n\t\tstanceId,\n\t\tselectedAppsInStance,\n\t\tappStatementMap,\n\t\tbody,\n\t\twindow,\n\t\tuserEmail\n\t);\n\n\tif (eventBatch.length > 0) {\n\t\tawait insertInChunks(effectivenessHistoryTable, eventBatch);\n\t}\n\n\t// Build full status tracker for all apps in stance (including non-selected)\n\tconst allAppsInStance = await db\n\t\t.select({ applicationId: applicationStancesTable.applicationId })\n\t\t.from(applicationStancesTable)\n\t\t.where(eq(applicationStancesTable.stanceId, stanceId));\n\tconst allAppIds = allAppsInStance.map(a => a.applicationId);\n\n\tconst allStanceStatements = await db\n\t\t.select({\n\t\t\tapplicationId: applicationStatementsTable.applicationId,\n\t\t\tstatementId: applicationStatementsTable.statementId\n\t\t})\n\t\t.from(applicationStatementsTable)\n\t\t.where(inArray(applicationStatementsTable.applicationId, allAppIds));\n\n\tconst fullStatusTracker = new Map<string, ControlStatus>();\n\tfor (const row of allStanceStatements) {\n\t\tfullStatusTracker.set(`${row.applicationId}:${row.statementId}`, null);\n\t}\n\n\t// Read ALL events for this stance from DB (including existing events from other apps)\n\t// so stance-level snapshots accurately reflect the full picture\n\tconst allEvents = await db\n\t\t.select({\n\t\t\tapplicationId: effectivenessHistoryTable.applicationId,\n\t\t\tstatementId: effectivenessHistoryTable.statementId,\n\t\t\tstanceId: effectivenessHistoryTable.stanceId,\n\t\t\tpreviousStatus: effectivenessHistoryTable.previousStatus,\n\t\t\tnewStatus: effectivenessHistoryTable.newStatus,\n\t\t\tchangedBy: effectivenessHistoryTable.changedBy,\n\t\t\tchangedAt: effectivenessHistoryTable.changedAt\n\t\t})\n\t\t.from(effectivenessHistoryTable)\n\t\t.where(eq(effectivenessHistoryTable.stanceId, stanceId))\n\t\t.orderBy(effectivenessHistoryTable.changedAt);\n\n\tconst allEventRows: Array<EventRow> = allEvents.map(e => ({\n\t\tapplicationId: e.applicationId,\n\t\tstatementId: e.statementId,\n\t\tstanceId: e.stanceId,\n\t\tpreviousStatus: e.previousStatus as ControlStatus,\n\t\tnewStatus: e.newStatus as ControlStatus,\n\t\tchangedBy: e.changedBy,\n\t\tchangedAt: e.changedAt\n\t}));\n\n\t// Fetch RMF context once per stance for tag + category computation\n\tconst allStatementIds = [...new Set(allStanceStatements.map(r => r.statementId))];\n\tconst rmfContext = await fetchRmfContext(allStatementIds);\n\n\tconst snapshotBatch = computeSnapshotsFromEvents(\n\t\tstanceId,\n\t\tallEventRows,\n\t\tfullStatusTracker,\n\t\tuserEmail,\n\t\trmfContext\n\t);\n\n\tif (snapshotBatch.length > 0) {\n\t\tawait insertInChunks(effectivenessSnapshotsTable, snapshotBatch);\n\t}\n\n\treturn { events: eventBatch.length, snapshots: snapshotBatch.length, finalStatuses };\n}\n\n/**\n * Generate realistic mock effectiveness history data for testing/demo purposes.\n */\nexport default defineEventHandler(async event => {\n\tconst userEmail = event.context.userData?.email;\n\n\tconst body = (await readBody(event)) as MockHistoryConfig;\n\tvalidateBody(body);\n\n\tconst db = getDrizzle();\n\n\ttry {\n\t\tconst { stanceIds, stanceAppsMap, appStatementMap } = await fetchRelationships(db, body);\n\n\t\tif (body.clearExisting) {\n\t\t\tawait clearExistingData(stanceIds, body.applicationIds);\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tconst window: TimeWindow = {\n\t\t\tnow: Date.now(),\n\t\t\tstartTime: Date.now() - body.durationDays * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000\n\t\t};\n\n\t\tlet totalEventsInserted = 0;\n\t\tlet totalSnapshotsInserted = 0;\n\n\t\t// Collect final statuses across all stances to sync applicationStatements\n\t\tconst mergedFinalStatuses = new Map<string, ControlStatus>();\n\n\t\tfor (const stanceId of stanceIds) {\n\t\t\tconst appsInStance = stanceAppsMap.get(stanceId) ?? [];\n\t\t\tconst selectedApps = appsInStance.filter(id => body.applicationIds.includes(id));\n\n\t\t\tconst result = await processStance(\n\t\t\t\tstanceId,\n\t\t\t\tselectedApps,\n\t\t\t\tappStatementMap,\n\t\t\t\tbody,\n\t\t\t\twindow,\n\t\t\t\tuserEmail!\n\t\t\t);\n\t\t\ttotalEventsInserted += result.events;\n\t\t\ttotalSnapshotsInserted += result.snapshots;\n\n\t\t\t// Merge final statuses (last stance wins for any overlapping app:stmt pairs)\n\t\t\tfor (const [key, status] of result.finalStatuses) {\n\t\t\t\tmergedFinalStatuses.set(key, status);\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Sync applicationStatements to match the final generated state\n\t\tawait syncApplicationStatements(mergedFinalStatuses, userEmail!);\n\n\t\tlogger.info(\n\t\t\t`Generated mock effectiveness history: ${totalEventsInserted} events, ${totalSnapshotsInserted} snapshots across ${stanceIds.length} stances`\n\t\t);\n\n\t\treturn {\n\t\t\tsuccess: true,\n\t\t\teventsInserted: totalEventsInserted,\n\t\t\tsnapshotsInserted: totalSnapshotsInserted,\n\t\t\tstancesAffected: stanceIds.length\n\t\t};\n\t} catch (error: unknown) {\n\t\tif (error && typeof error === \"object\" && \"statusCode\" in error) {\n\t\t\tthrow error;\n\t\t}\n\t\tlogger.error(\"Failed to generate mock effectiveness history:\", error);\n\t\tthrow createError({\n\t\t\tstatusCode: 500,\n\t\t\tmessage: \"Failed to generate mock effectiveness history\"\n\t\t});\n\t}\n});\n\n/** Fetch stance and statement relationships for the given apps */\nasync function fetchRelationships(\n\t// oxlint-disable-next-line no-explicit-any\n\tdb: any,\n\tbody: MockHistoryConfig\n) {\n\tconst appStances = await db\n\t\t.select({\n\t\t\tapplicationId: applicationStancesTable.applicationId,\n\t\t\tstanceId: applicationStancesTable.stanceId\n\t\t})\n\t\t.from(applicationStancesTable)\n\t\t.where(inArray(applicationStancesTable.applicationId, body.applicationIds));\n\n\tif (appStances.length === 0) {\n\t\tthrow createError({\n\t\t\tstatusCode: 400,\n\t\t\tmessage: \"Selected applications are not linked to any stances\"\n\t\t});\n\t}\n\n\tconst stanceIds = [...new Set(appStances.map((r: { stanceId: string }) => r.stanceId))];\n\tconst stanceAppsMap = new Map<string, Array<string>>();\n\tfor (const r of appStances) {\n\t\tif (!stanceAppsMap.has(r.stanceId)) {\n\t\t\tstanceAppsMap.set(r.stanceId, []);\n\t\t}\n\t\tstanceAppsMap.get(r.stanceId)!.push(r.applicationId);\n\t}\n\n\tconst appStatements = await db\n\t\t.select({\n\t\t\tapplicationId: applicationStatementsTable.applicationId,\n\t\t\tstatementId: applicationStatementsTable.statementId\n\t\t})\n\t\t.from(applicationStatementsTable)\n\t\t.where(inArray(applicationStatementsTable.applicationId, body.applicationIds));\n\n\tif (appStatements.length === 0) {\n\t\tthrow createError({\n\t\t\tstatusCode: 400,\n\t\t\tmessage: \"Selected applications have no linked controls/statements\"\n\t\t});\n\t}\n\n\tconst appStatementMap = new Map<string, Array<string>>();\n\tfor (const r of appStatements) {\n\t\tif (!appStatementMap.has(r.applicationId)) {\n\t\t\tappStatementMap.set(r.applicationId, []);\n\t\t}\n\t\tappStatementMap.get(r.applicationId)!.push(r.statementId);\n\t}\n\n\treturn { stanceIds: stanceIds as Array<string>, stanceAppsMap, appStatementMap };\n}\n\n/**\n * Sync the actual applicationStatements table to match the final simulated state.\n * This ensures the live dashboard matches the last history snapshot.\n */\nasync function syncApplicationStatements(\n\tfinalStatuses: Map<string, ControlStatus>,\n\tuserEmail: string\n) {\n\tconst db = getDrizzle();\n\tlet synced = 0;\n\n\tfor (const [key, status] of finalStatuses) {\n\t\tconst [appId, stmtId] = key.split(\":\");\n\t\tawait db\n\t\t\t.update(applicationStatementsTable)\n\t\t\t.set({\n\t\t\t\tstatus,\n\t\t\t\tupdatedBy: userEmail,\n\t\t\t\tupdatedAt: new Date().toISOString()\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t.where(\n\t\t\t\tand(\n\t\t\t\t\teq(applicationStatementsTable.applicationId, appId),\n\t\t\t\t\teq(applicationStatementsTable.statementId, stmtId)\n\t\t\t\t)\n\t\t\t);\n\t\tsynced += 1;\n\t}\n\n\tlogger.info(`Synced ${synced} applicationStatement statuses to match generated history`);\n}\n\n/** Clear existing effectiveness data scoped to the selected applications only.\n * For stance-level snapshots (applicationId IS NULL), these are also cleared because\n * they will be regenerated from the complete event timeline (including non-selected apps). */\nasync function clearExistingData(stanceIds: Array<string>, applicationIds: Array<string>) {\n\tconst db = getDrizzle();\n\tfor (const stanceId of stanceIds) {\n\t\t// Clear events only for selected apps\n\t\tawait db\n\t\t\t.delete(effectivenessHistoryTable)\n\t\t\t.where(\n\t\t\t\tand(\n\t\t\t\t\teq(effectivenessHistoryTable.stanceId, stanceId),\n\t\t\t\t\tinArray(effectivenessHistoryTable.applicationId, applicationIds)\n\t\t\t\t)\n\t\t\t);\n\t\t// Clear per-app snapshots only for selected apps\n\t\tawait db\n\t\t\t.delete(effectivenessSnapshotsTable)\n\t\t\t.where(\n\t\t\t\tand(\n\t\t\t\t\teq(effectivenessSnapshotsTable.stanceId, stanceId),\n\t\t\t\t\tinArray(effectivenessSnapshotsTable.applicationId, applicationIds)\n\t\t\t\t)\n\t\t\t);\n\t\t// Clear stance-level snapshots (will be regenerated from all events)\n\t\tawait db\n\t\t\t.delete(effectivenessSnapshotsTable)\n\t\t\t.where(\n\t\t\t\tand(\n\t\t\t\t\teq(effectivenessSnapshotsTable.stanceId, stanceId),\n\t\t\t\t\tisNull(effectivenessSnapshotsTable.applicationId)\n\t\t\t\t)\n\t\t\t);\n\t}\n\tlogger.info(\n\t\t`Cleared existing effectiveness data for ${applicationIds.length} app(s) across ${stanceIds.length} stance(s)`\n\t);\n}\n"
    }
